title: A Full Meal — Restaurant English
description: Ordering a real meal: starter, main, dessert. Substitutions, allergies, paying the bill.
summary_pt_br: Pedir uma refeição completa em restaurante: starter, main, dessert. Pedir substituições, avisar alergias, pedir a conta. Formas educadas: 'Could I have...', 'Without...', 'I'm allergic to...'.

turns.en: Yes — I'll have the soup as a starter, and the fish as a main.
turns.pt: Sim — sopa de entrada e peixe como prato principal.

turns.en: A sparkling water, please. No ice.
turns.pt: Uma água com gás, sem gelo.

turns.en: Oh — I'm allergic to nuts. Could you check with the chef?
turns.pt: Ah — sou alérgico a nozes. Pode checar com o chef?

items.term: Could I get the bill, please?

items.pt: A taxa de serviço está incluída?

exercise.question: You want the bill. Which?
options: Could I get the bill, please?
exercise.explanation: 'Could I get the bill, please?' — polite standard.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Forma educada: 'Could I get the bill, please?'

exercise.question: Complete: "For two, ___."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "For two, please."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. ('Dois copos de água.')
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Two glasses of water, please."

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good evening. A table for how many?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Here is the menu. Any drinks to start?
turns.pt: Aqui o cardápio. Bebida pra começar?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I will have the fish and salad.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: She will have the pasta with chicken.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, one chocolate cake to share.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Perfect. I will bring your drinks now.

scenes.title: Listening story — A Full Meal — Restaurant English
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Waiter and a student. Ordering a real meal: starter, main, dessert. Substitutions, allergies, paying the bill. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Waiter
paragraphs.en: Good evening. A table for how many?

paragraphs.speaker: Waiter
paragraphs.en: Here is the menu. Any drinks to start?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Yes, I will have the fish and salad.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Waiter. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "A Full Meal — Restaurant English". Ordering a real meal: starter, main, dessert. Substitutions, allergies, paying the bill. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "A Full Meal — Restaurant English". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'A Full Meal — Restaurant English'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "A Full Meal — Restaurant English".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: Perfect English Grammar
sources.pt_hint: Regras de gramática + exercícios interativos gratuitos.

sources.label: British Council · A2
sources.pt_hint: Leituras A2 com exercícios de compreensão.
